_comment:
EDIT THIS FILE TO CHANGE ANY TEXT OR LINK ON YOUR PORTFOLIO. After editing, push to Vercel — site updates automatically. HTML uses ... for highlights,
for line breaks. **bold** in project narratives is the orange accent.

site.title: Artem Iskandirov — Product Designer
site.description: Product Designer. Uchi.ru / VK EdTech. Based in Kazan.

cat.name: Artem Iskandirov
cat.bio: Product designer at Uchi.ru / VK EdTech. I work across B2C & B2B, mobile & web — kids edtech, retail AI and design systems. 7+ years in product.
cat.gameSub: You are X · Cat is O · Cat cheats
cat.catchSub: 30 seconds — tap as many as you can

fantasy.name: Artem Iskandirov
fantasy.bio: Wandering craftsman of interfaces — forging realms of kids lore, retail divination & design sigils. Sworn Knight-Senior of the Uchi.ru hold, seven winters at the craft.
meta: Open to far roads · remote keeps · relocation
fantasy.gameSub: You — Sword · Dragon — Sigil · It is no honest beast
fantasy.statusYouWin: The dragon falls. Songs shall be sung.
fantasy.statusCheat: The dragon cheats! It claims one of your sigils.
fantasy.catchSub: 30 seconds — tap as many as you can

labels.projectsIntro: Product designer with 7+ years across EdTech, retail AI, fintech and medtech. I ship measurable outcomes — from A/B-won purchase flows to systems used by tens of thousands of people. Currently Senior at Uchi.ru / VK EdTech.

work.title: Uchi.ru
work.line: EdTech for millions of kids. I own the **design system, gamification and sound UX**. Designed a new purchase flow that won its A/B test (==ARPU +5%, conversion +7%==), shipped features that grew kids' social activity, and systematised multimodal audio across the product. **Won 1st place at the company AI hackathon.**

work.title: Ailet
work.line: AI-vision retail SaaS used by P&G, Coca-Cola and Mars. Designed the **analytics web platform and the mobile field app** for merchandisers and auditors. Ran in-store UX research, introduced UX metrics into delivery. ==CSAT/CSI +5pp, support tickets −8%==, steady growth in task completion.

work.title: Ak Bars
work.line: Fintech — the **investments section inside the bank's app**. Designed a scalable UI architecture for adding new products, worked with behavioural analytics. ==Entries to investments +11%== after the home-screen redesign, **checkout drop-off −12%**, faster purchase flow.

work.title: BARS Group
work.line: MedTech — redesigned a **medical information system deployed across 12 Russian regions, 10,000+ users**. Researched 7+ professional roles (doctors, nurses, admins) and adapted flows per role. ==Routine tasks −10% time==, positive feedback in 3 of 5 pilot regions, onboarding without manuals.

side.title: Custom Vibrations
side.line: iOS app for crafting haptic patterns — vibe-coded in Cursor + Xcode

side.title: Telegram Digester
side.line: No-code bot that summarises my channels into one daily digest

side.title: BI Agent
side.line: AI agent that answers retail BI-data questions in plain chat

side.title: Sound UX
side.line: Talk at Chulakov Design Meetup on how sound shapes product feel

side.title: Figma Linter — AI
side.line: AI plugin that reviews layouts against the design system: reads connected libraries into JSON, binds colors/spacing/fonts to DS tokens, swaps detached components, fixes off-token paddings and rewrites placeholder copy on request. Source of truth = the DS in Figma.
